use_cases: Call-to-action buttons for landing pages and marketing sites
Form submission and confirmation actions in web applications
Primary action triggers in dashboards and admin panels
Navigation action buttons with hover feedback effects
Interactive elements with animated state transitions
ai_summary: A premium button component with gradient variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary) featuring glass-morphism effects through backdrop blur, motion animations via motion/react library, and polished hover/active states with scale and shadow transitions. Includes Radix UI Slot for polymorphic behavior and CVA variant management.
